name: Forbez Credit Consulting LLC
description_short: Forbez Credit Consulting LLC is a Dallas-based credit repair firm established in 2016 offering credit consultation and financing services to help consumers improve their credit profiles.
description_long:
Forbez Credit Consulting LLC was established in 2016 and operates from a professional office location at 9330 Lyndon B Johnson Fwy Suite 900 in Dallas, Texas. The company is listed in the loan and financing services category and serves the Dallas metropolitan area with a focus on credit-related solutions.

Based on available information, Forbez Credit Consulting provides credit consulting services aimed at helping consumers address credit issues and improve their financial standing. The company operates during standard business hours Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM, with a dedicated phone line for customer inquiries at (214) 296-9678. They maintain a physical office location with private parking available for clients visiting in person.

The company distinguishes itself through its specialized focus on credit consulting rather than broader loan services. Forbez accepts multiple payment methods including American Express, Visa, MasterCard, Discover, Debit Cards, and PayPal, providing flexibility for client transactions. The business location places them near other financial service providers in the Dallas area, suggesting an established financial services corridor.

While the company has been operating for nearly a decade, the website provides limited detail about specific service offerings, dispute processes, or measurable outcomes. No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials are currently visible on the listing. The lack of a dedicated company website URL or email contact information may present challenges for consumers seeking detailed service information or online communication options. Prospective clients should contact the company directly by phone to understand their specific credit repair methodologies and pricing structures.
address: 9330 Lyndon B Johnson Fwy #900, Dallas, TX 75243

pros: Established business operating since 2016 with physical Dallas office location
Dedicated phone line (214) 296-9678 for direct customer contact
Accepts six payment methods including PayPal and major credit cards for convenience
Professional office suite location at established address with private parking
Consistent business hours Monday-Friday, 8:30 AM-4:30 PM for accessibility
Located in financial services district near other lending and financing companies
cons: No company website URL provided limits ability to research services online
No email contact method available for inquiries or consultations
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials visible to evaluate service quality
Limited service descriptions available on public listing
No information about credit dispute process, timelines, or success rates
Minimal online presence makes verification of credentials difficult
best_for: Dallas-area residents who prefer in-person consultation for credit issues
Consumers with credit report errors seeking dispute assistance
Individuals willing to call directly to discuss credit consulting needs
diagnosis: Forbez Credit Consulting LLC appears to be a credit repair firm for Dallas-area consumers seeking in-person consultation. However, the lack of online presence, customer reviews, detailed service information, and alternative contact methods significantly limits transparency—prospective clients must call directly to understand what services are offered and at what cost.
services: Credit consulting and credit profile assessment
